notes: Compact, axiom-clean file (no sorries, no maxHeartbeats) implementing divisor-pushforward via Finsupp.mapDomain. All five simp/theorem declarations in the file are consumed by callers in HasseWeil/EC/IsogenyAG/HomProperty.lean, making the 'unused in file' list a red herring — these are key exported API. The file is a pure leaf in the import graph with no duplication suspicion.
